subcodes.first_line: O exalted Branch of the Blessed Tree! Divine decrees are founded upon a consummate wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره المبارکه ... مقدرات ربانیه مبنی بر حکمت کلیه است سر قدر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering
